actors.text: Test H0: p1=p2 vs Ha: p1 != p2. z=2.21, p-value=0.027, alpha=0.05. Pick the conclusion.
Reject H0; convincing evidence the two city support rates differ
Fail to reject H0; insufficient evidence the rates differ
actors.reflection: 0.027 < 0.05, so we DO reject H0. Fail-to-reject only applies when p-value > alpha.

actors.text: Accept Ha; city A has a higher support rate than city B
actors.reflection: Two issues: tests never 'accept' Ha (we reject H0), and a two-sided test does not establish which direction. Just say the rates differ.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
